title: The Dog And His Image.
content:
A foolish Dog, who carried in his jaw
    A juicy bone,
    Looked down into a stream, and there he saw
    Another one,
    Splash! In he plunged.. The image disappeared - 
    The meat he had was gone.
    Indeed, he nearly sank,
    And barely reached the bank.
meaning:
Jean de La Fontaine's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Dog And His Image."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
